title: شيخ روحاني في الكويت ✅0096899044920✅ تواصل الان
excerpt: Can I create more than one payment form and link them to the customer’s payment gateway?

posts.author: edpillst (edpillst)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I create more than one payment form and link them to the customer’s payment gateway?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Are you using monday forms for the payment forms?

If so, you can create more than one form view on your board, yes! Is the customer’s payment gateway on your website or somewhere else? It might be helpful for our support team to see screenshots of what you are looking to do so they can suggest the best options. You can reach us here.
